title: Automation-Default First Run Experience
description: 参照 value-oriented product design principles，把 ZAgenticLoop 升级为默认自动推进、只在真实 stop signal 停下来的产品体验。

decisions.q: 本轮产品升级的主目标是什么？
decisions.answer: Automation-Default First Run Experience：用户选择一个目标 route 后，系统默认尽可能自动跑到 review artifact；只有遇到真实 stop signal 才停。
decisions.note: 参照 docs/prds/value-oriented-product-design-principles.md 的 Default Toward Automated Loops。

decisions.q: Stop Signal 是否作为独立主线？
decisions.answer: 是，但作为 Automation-Default First Run 的必要底座来做，而不是孤立协议工程。
decisions.note: 停下来的体验必须一等化：reason、responsible layer、evidence、next step、retry policy、human required。

decisions.q: 本轮是否优先增加更多 route？
decisions.answer: 否。优先把现有关键 route 的 first-run 自动推进体验打通，再评估新增 route 或继续 live promotion。
decisions.note: 避免继续堆组件，先解决用户需要多次切换、多次确认、容易不知道在哪里继续的问题。

1-1.label: 用户目标导向的 First Run 入口
1-1.notes: 完成条件：用户能用一个目标导向入口选择第一条自动化 loop；输出推荐 route、为什么推荐、会自动做什么、什么情况下会停。

1-2.label: 自动化前提条件审查与成本包络
1-2.notes: 完成条件：每条候选 route 在自动运行前都能产出资格检查结果，覆盖 route enablement、consumer capability、provider support、credentials、actor permission、budget、workspace safety、verification gates。

1-3.label: 结构化 Stop Signal 体系
1-3.notes: 完成条件：所有不能自动继续的情况都输出结构化 stop signal，包含 stop_reason、responsible_layer、evidence、next_steps、retry_policy、human_required、confirmation_location。

1-4.label: Route 到 Consumer 的自动推进编排
1-4.notes: 完成条件：从 Route Decision 到 Request Carrier 到 Consumer 的主路径可以自动衔接；Roadmap-Sliced 可在 max_slices 内连续执行多个 eligible slice，最终生成 PR/MR 或明确 stop signal。

1-5.label: 证据回放与状态可解释性
1-5.notes: 完成条件：自动运行成功、跳过、失败、停止都能被用户从一个执行摘要中理解，并能回放到 route decision、request carrier、consumer plan、runner evidence、review artifact。

1-6.label: 用户项目安装与升级体验
1-6.notes: 完成条件：zj-loop-init/audit/route status 能组合成安装后的推荐路径；GitHub/GitLab provider adapter 安装后能提示下一步 smoke、route enablement、auto-run readiness 和升级影响。

1-7.label: Dogfood 验证与发布门槛
1-7.notes: 完成条件：本仓和至少一个用户项目式 fixture 走通自动化 first-run；发布门槛能防止 README/Quickstart 宣称的自动体验与实际 route/consumer 能力漂移。

1-1-1.label: 目标选择式启动命令
1-1-1.notes: Added packaged zj-loop-first-run plan command in @jununfly/zj-loop-core. It produces zj-loop.first_run_plan.v1, supports goals auto/smoke/roadmap/issue-backlog/ci/closeout, and exits nonzero only when the first-run plan has stop signals. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core.

1-1-2.label: Route 菜单与推荐首选路径
1-1-2.notes: First-run plan includes route_menu entries with route id, consumer, enabled flag, execution mode, readiness, side effect level, recommended_for_first_run, and human-readable why. Default auto goal recommends manual-smoke-report; targeted goals can recommend roadmap, issue backlog, CI, or closeout routes. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core.

1-1-3.label: 端到端用户故事示例
1-1-3.notes: README and user-project execution-ready bundle now show the first-run story: scaffold, run zj-loop-first-run plan, inspect recommended route, use targeted goals for roadmap or issue-backlog, then continue with smoke/status/readiness. Verification: docs diff plus git diff --check.

1-2-1.label: 自动运行资格检查矩阵
1-2-1.notes: First-run plan now emits a preconditions matrix with fixed ids for route-enabled, consumer-capability, provider-support, credentials-and-authority, cost-budget, workspace-safety, and verification-gates. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core.

1-2-2.label: 权限凭证与 Provider 能力检查
1-2-2.notes: Provider support uses collectProjectEvidenceFacts for provider detection and adapter evidence. Credentials/authority are pass for report-only routes and warning for side-effecting routes, with runtime token and actor-permission next steps. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core.

1-2-3.label: 预算与 max_slices 成本控制
1-2-3.notes: Budget precondition checks for zj-loop/zj-loop-budget.md. Roadmap-Sliced plans explicitly mention max_slices=30 and warn when budget file is missing before long-running automation. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core.

1-2-4.label: 工作区安全与验证门槛检查
1-2-4.notes: Workspace safety precondition checks for zj-loop/zj-loop-safety.md. Verification gate precondition requires route capability verifiers and turns missing verifiers into hard stop signals. Documentation now explains preconditions and stop_signals in README and user-project bundle. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core; git diff --check.

1-3-1.label: Stop Signal 固定协议字段
1-3-1.notes: 完成：FirstRunStopSignal 固定输出 stop_code、severity、stop_reason、responsible_layer、evidence、next_steps、retry_policy、human_required、confirmation_location；TypeScript 类型约束已落地。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-3-2.label: 停机原因分类与责任层归属
1-3-2.notes: 完成：stop_code 区分 route-disabled、route-contract-invalid、runner-not-execution-ready、precondition-failed、execution-blocked；responsible_layer 区分 route-table、route-contract、consumer-runner-maturity、consumer-runner、first-run-precondition，避免 agent 把停机责任混淆。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-3-3.label: 下一步动作与确认位置输出
1-3-3.notes: 完成：stop signal 保留 next_steps，并在 human_required 时输出 confirmation_location；测试断言 terminal command 位置存在，文档说明包含 confirmation location。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-3-4.label: 可重试策略与新请求边界
1-3-4.notes: 完成：stop signal 按类型输出 retry_policy；配置/契约/启用类问题要求 after-configuration-change，普通执行阻塞保留 same-request，Activation Request 重建边界可由上游 consumer 根据该字段判断。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-4-1.label: Route Decision 到 Request Carrier 自动衔接
1-4-1.notes: 完成：FirstRunPlan 新增 dispatch_handoff，固定表达 Route Decision 后的下一跳；request_carrier_required 与 input_contract 明确 carrier 边界，避免 agent 运行时猜测。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-4-2.label: Request Carrier 到 Consumer 自动消费
1-4-2.notes: 完成：dispatch_handoff 输出 packaged_command、dispatch_status、dispatch_mode；ready/report-only/blocked 三态均有测试覆盖，consumer 自动消费入口不再只藏在自然语言 next_steps。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-4-3.label: Roadmap-Sliced 多 slice 自动执行
1-4-3.notes: 完成：roadmap-sliced-development 的 dispatch_handoff 固定到 zj-loop-roadmap-activation execute，并声明 activation_request_comment/request_id/source_issue_or_prd 输入契约；多 slice 执行继续由 Roadmap Activation bounded consumer 承担。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-4-4.label: Review Artifact 与 Closeout 自动衔接
1-4-4.notes: 完成：dispatch_handoff 增加 review_handoff 与 closeout_handoff；roadmap route 明确 PR handoff 与 post-merge-roadmap-closeout，修复链路尾部靠记忆的问题。验证：tools/zj-loop-core npm test 125 passed；git diff --check passed。

1-5-1.label: 统一执行摘要与证据索引

1-5-2.label: Route 状态解释与能力等级展示

1-6-3.label: 升级时保留自动化意图
